decisions.description: This will decide whether User is allowed to delete the record
decisions.name: Delete_Allowed
decisions.label: Delete Allowed?

Flow.description: Recycle Case action performed from the "Recycle Bin" button on case layouts - 6920
Flow.label: Recycle Case Screen flow

fields.name: Are_you_sure_you_want_to_delete_this_case
fields.fieldText: Are you sure you want to delete this case?

fields.name: Display_Error
fields.fieldText: You are not allowed to delete a case.

variables.description: Collect the case ids selected in list vew
variables.name: ids

variables.description: Record Type of the Case record
variables.name: oRecordType
